platform: xAI Responses API and Grok custom connectors

version_contract.calibration_scope: Public framework-provisional default. Licensed runtime calibration is resolved by profile, sector, geography, and active manifest; verify through /v1/calibration-health.
version_contract.deployment_provider_revision: Recorded in release evidence after deployment; not self-embedded because a provider revision is created by the deployment itself.

responses_api_tool.server_description: Use MVR relational-readiness preflight before recommending pre-MVP build, market entry, launch, pilot, investment, partnership, lending or BNPL, deployment, expansion, or scale in an African or high-context market. Also use it when a user asks the model to ignore, fabricate, or transfer evidence to force such a recommendation. It checks market trust, permission, embeddedness, stakeholder readiness, and evidence gaps; it never authorizes. Do not use for factual lookups such as capitals or GDP, definitions of MVR, pure coding, generic writing, travel, translation, news summaries, legal certification, regulatory approval, or autonomous execution.

selection_observatory.host_surface: xAI Responses API with remote MCP
selection_observatory.boundary: This result covers the named xAI Responses API configuration only. It is not an ordinary Grok.com, connector-catalogue, mobile, Business-provisioning, cross-host, adoption, or outcome result.

grok_com_operator_observation.host_model: not disclosed by the host UI
grok_com_operator_observation.scoring_boundary: These sequential pre/post product observations used different prompts and metadata revisions. They are evidence of a corrected selection failure, not a frozen-track selection rate or host leaderboard result.

connector_boundary: The xAI Responses API remote-MCP path passed a controlled three-case canary and the published frozen 40-case selection track after a disclosed failed baseline and remediation. A Grok.com custom connector was separately installed, discovered all five tools, and executed mvr_first_call when explicitly requested; its bounded pre/post observations are not the API benchmark. Mobile, Grok on X, catalogue placement, and Business provisioning remain unverified.
approval_boundary: xAI documents that require_approval is not currently supported on its OpenAI-compatible remote MCP path. The dedicated endpoint therefore exposes only five read-only tools, and the Responses API recipe also retains allowed_tools as defense in depth.
production_boundary: The endpoint is the public sandbox. Licensed production Streamable HTTP MCP is not yet public.
